subcodes.title: Public address given on 1913-04-06
subcodes.first_line: Many meetings are organized and established in all parts of the world; societies and organizations for the extension of general intercourse
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @unity; oneness of humanity, @equality of men and women, @teachings as spirit of the age, @unity in diversity, @fanaticism and hatred, @martyrs and martyrdom
